member.name: T:Prime.PinService.ActiveCollection
member.summary: Wrapper for the Active collection identifier.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.ActiveCollection.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: name of the active collection.

member.name: P:Prime.PinService.ActiveCollection.CollectionName
member.summary: Gets identifier of an active collection.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.ConfigurationFile.Parser.ParseFile(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a configuration object from the file.
member.param: The Configuration file's path.
member.returns: The configuration object.

member.name: P:Prime.PinService.DataCollection.StorageData
member.summary: Gets or sets the data collected per pin.

member.name: T:Prime.PinService.Domain
member.summary: Wrapper for the settings of a profile.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.Domain.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: identifier.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.Internal.IPinService.DeviceEnd(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.Internal.IPinService.GetPinMap(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the stored pin map data.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Map of all stored pins with each id.

member.name: T:Prime.PinService.IPinService
member.summary: Service with the functionality related to pin or any resource defined on the tester datfiles.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.Exists(System.String)
member.param: Name of the pin.
member.returns: Boolean true if pin exist, else false.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.StartDataCollection(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Starts collecting data for the given pin names (DPS or TDAU).
member.param: The tag for the current profile.
The list of pins to profile.
The sampling interval of the measurements in ms.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.DeleteDataCollection(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes the data for the given collection.
member.param: The tag for the current profile.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.StopDataCollection(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Stops collecting data for the given pin names (DPS or TDAU).
member.param: The tag for the current profile.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.GetDataCollection(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Gets the data that was collected for the given pin names (DPS or TDAU).
member.exception: HdmtApi GetSensorCollectionDataAsync failed with these collection name, pin names and measurement type.
member.param: The tag for the desired collection.
The list of pins to profile.
type of data that was collected Ex: Voltage.
member.returns: collected measurements per pin.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.StopPerInstanceProfile(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Stops the per instance profiler started by the given tag.
member.exception: No active profile for current tag.
member.param: The tag for the current profile.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.GetPinAttributeValues(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.String})
member.summary: Retrieve a Pin Attribute for a given pin or pingroup name.
member.param: Name of the pin or group.
Name of the attributes to be retrieved.
member.returns: Value of the Attribute for the given pin or pingroup.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.SetPinAttributeValues(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Set a Pin Attribute for a given pin or pingroup name.
member.param: Name of the pin or pin group.
Value of the attributes to be set.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.SetDriveTiming(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adjust drive timing while the pattern generator is running.
member.param: Pin name or pin group to set values.
Drive time delta to set.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.SetCompareTiming(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Modifies the compare timing on a pin in hardware.
member.param: Pin name or pin group to set values.
Compare time delta to set.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.GetStreamingSensorData(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the streaming sensor data for the current tag.
member.param: The tag for the current profile.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: A list containing the streaming sensor data for the current tag.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.GetAll(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the List of all defined pins.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: A list containing all defined pins.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.GetAll(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the List of all defined pins for the given resource type.
member.param: The resource type.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: A list containing all defined pins for given resource type.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.Get(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the IPin handler for the given pin name.
member.param: The name of the pin.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: The handler of the pin.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.Get(System.UInt32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets an IPin with the information for the given pin Channel.
member.param: The pin Channel to get.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: The IPin with the information for the given pin Name.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.IsPinMapEnabled(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: true - PinMap enabled, false - otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.GetOrderedPinsByChannelForDomain(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get a map with the name of pins and the channel they belong to for a specific domain.
member.param: Name of the domain.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Returns a map of pin names and channels.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.PreExecute(System.String,System.UInt32,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Execute the actions for the per instance profiler that goes before the Execute.
member.param: Name of the current test instances.
Number of the unit in the current lot.
If has to print or not.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.PostExecute(System.String,System.UInt32,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Execute the actions for the per instance profiler that goes after the Execute.
member.param: Name of the current test instances.
Number of the unit in the current lot.
If has to print or not.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.DeviceEnd(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.GetPinMap(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the stored pin map data.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Map of all stored pins with each id.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.GetPinNamesInPattern(System.String)
member.param: Pattern name of interest to extract pin names.
member.returns: Pin names existed in pattern.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPinService.GetChannelByPinName(System.String)
member.param: Pin name.
member.returns: Pin channel. Return 0 if pin name is a pin group.

member.name: T:Prime.PinService.IPerPinDataCollection
member.summary: Contains the methods necessary to post process the streaming sensor data.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPerPinDataCollection.GetPinName
member.summary: Gets the name of the current pin.
member.returns: A string containing the name of the current pin.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPerPinDataCollection.GetDataType
member.returns: A string containing the data type.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPerPinDataCollection.GetData
member.returns: A list of double containing the streaming sensor data.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPin.GetName
member.summary: Returns the name of the pin as the user requested.
member.returns: string.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPin.GetFullName
member.summary: Gets the full name of the current pin for the platform, including the scope if it applies.
member.returns: The full name including the scope.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPin.IsType(System.String)
member.param: type.
member.returns: bool.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPin.GetChannel
member.returns: return the channel number of this object.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPin.IsGroup
member.summary: If the current pin is a pin group or not.
member.returns: True if the current pin is a pin group, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPin.GetResourceType
member.summary: Gets the resource type from the platform perspective.
member.returns: The platform resource type for the current pin.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPin.VerifyAttribute(System.String,System.String)
member.param: attribute.
value.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPin.SetAttributes(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Gets all the attributes and values for a pin or each pin in a pin group.
member.param: The list of attribute->value pairs to be applied.
member.exception: If the there are invalid pairs or if the attribute->values are invalid for the current IPin object.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPin.GetAllAttributes
member.summary: Gets all the attributes for the resource of the given pin.
member.returns: A list of attribute names.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPin.GetVforceMandatoryAttributes
member.summary: Gets all the attributes required to apply a VForce for the resource of the given pin.
member.returns: The list of attributes.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPin.GetIforceMandatoryAttributes
member.summary: Gets all the attributes required to apply an IForce for the resource of the given pin.
member.returns: The list of attributes.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPin.GetPinAttributeValues(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Gets all the attributes and values for a pin or each pin if current IPin is a pin group.
member.param: Attribute names.
member.returns: The list of attributes.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPin.GetPinNames
member.summary: Gets all the pin names in a pin group if current IPin is a pin group, otherwise the current IPin name.
member.returns: The list of pin names.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPin.HasMapId(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: If the current pin has Map Id or not.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: True if the current pin has Map Id, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPin.GetMapId(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: unsigned value of unique identifier.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPin.GetSubPins
member.summary: Gets all the sub pins of the given pin group.
member.returns: The list of sub pins.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.IPin.GetDomains
member.summary: Get all domains for current pins.
member.returns: Hashset of domains.

member.summary: Wrapper for the settings of a profile.

member.summary: Gets the name of the pin from which the data was measured.

member.summary: Gets the type of the collected data.

type of the collected data.

member.summary: Utility methods for the whole service.

member.param: Pin name.
member.returns: Pin full name.

member.name: M:Prime.PinService.Utility.ConvertToFullName(System.String)
member.summary: Convert pin name to IP domain pin name.

member.returns: Pin name with IP domain, return same as input if not in IP domain.
